BMP.contextSentence: Through rasterization of a BMP picture,the imaging details,such as the position coordinates of the color distribution of each pixel and the color transition relationship between imaging grids,are analyzed and several functional formulas are listed.

registered map.contextSentence: By calculating the connected domain based on the comparison difference between the registered map and the map to be inspected and filtering out the parts smaller than the threshold, large foreign matters such as circuit pits and burrs can be inspected, and size mismatches can also be inspected.

Squeegee angle.contextSentence: The angle of the squeegee blade relative to the stencil, affecting fill, wiping, and paste volume. By adjusting the Squeegee angle, we reduced smearing without changing pressure on the FUJI printer.

Reflow profile.contextSentence: The specific temperature profile used in the reflow oven (preheat/soak/peak/cooling) for soldering. After changing the paste, we retuned the Reflow profile on the FUJI line.

Temperature profile.contextSentence: A time–temperature curve used to control heating and cooling conditions in processes such as reflow. We logged the Temperature profile to correlate defects with the FUJI reflow settings.

Reflow (peak heating).contextSentence: The stage where temperature exceeds solder liquidus and solder fully melts to form joints. We ensured sufficient time above liquidus during Reflow (peak heating) on the FUJI line.

Through-hole assembly (THT).contextSentence: An assembly method where component leads are inserted into plated through holes and soldered (THT). Because connectors often require Through-hole assembly (THT), we manage them in a separate process from the FUJI SMT line.

TOP assembly (Target On Paste).contextSentence: A method that adds a target onto paste after placement and uses reflow self-alignment to improve placement accuracy. We used TOP assembly (Target On Paste) to suppress 0402 misalignment on the FUJI line.

Wi-Fi Reload.contextSentence: Press ‘Up’ / ‘Down’ to select ‘Wi-Fi Reset’ / ‘Wi-fi Reload’ and long press ‘Enter’.

replace.contextSentence: Adjust: Replace the data of the selected row with the plug -in da ta obtained in the ROI area of the current image.

extraction.contextSentence: The most commonly used algorithms are region method, OCV and color extraction.

segmentation.contextSentence: Click on the OCV/OCR algorithm in the attribute interface of the inspection frame, and then click on the "OCV/OCR" button to enter the OCV character segmentation window, as shown in the following figure.

image section.contextSentence: For each item, color extraction determines whether the inspection frame can reach this color standard and thereby determines whether the inspection frame is qualified or NG by setting the thresholds of three channels, including hue, brightness and saturation, of pixels within the image section and setting.

section.contextSentence: 42 the ratio of pixel points satisfying the thresholds of the three channels to the pixel points within the section as standard.

placement area.contextSentence: PCBs in the pro-ductivity lane are simply transported through the placement area so that they can be populated on a machine further downstream on the line.

area.contextSentence: The placement process starts as soon as one PCB is trans-ported into the processing area.

placement line.contextSentence: This increases the true output of the placement line.

unaffected area.contextSentence: If shorter waiting times occur in a placement area (due to lon-ger cycle times in the oven, for example), the down-stream placement areas can continue to work since the unaffected area can easily access the PCB that is wait-ing in the buffer zone.

placement areas.contextSentence: If shorter waiting times occur in a placement area (due to lon-ger cycle times in the oven, for example), the down-stream placement areas can continue to work since the unaffected area can easily access the PCB that is wait-ing in the buffer zone.

external setup area.contextSentence: The component changeover tables can be set up directly on the machine or in an external set-up area with feeder modules.

work area.contextSentence: Wear the right dress: operators do not wear too loose clothes, do not wear ties, rings, bracelets, the work area must w ear non -slip shoes, if left long hair must wear a hat;.

buffer zone.contextSentence: If shorter waiting times occur in a placement area (due to lon-ger cycle times in the oven, for example), the down-stream placement areas can continue to work since the unaffected area can easily access the PCB that is wait-ing in the buffer zone.

semantic_name_extension.name: Clamp

clamped.contextSentence: As soon as the cir-cuit board has reached its target position, the conveyor belt is stopped and the board is clamped from below.

clamping.contextSentence: Move-ment and clamping of the PCBs are monitored.

Clamp.contextSentence: A mechanism that holds the PCB in position during printing or placement. We adjusted the Clamp settings to eliminate board shift on the FUJI printer.

2-point clamp.contextSentence: A clamping method that holds the board at two points; it can be unstable for warped or thin boards. We avoided 2-point clamp for this warped board on the FUJI printer.

4-point clamp.contextSentence: A clamping method that holds the board at four points for improved stability. Switching to a 4-point clamp improved print repeatability on the FUJI line.

Air clamp (pneumatic clamp).contextSentence: A clamp driven by pneumatic pressure for holding the board from the side or top. We verified air pressure for the Air clamp (pneumatic clamp) to prevent board damage on the FUJI printer.

purpose.contextSentence: By clicking to select the components in the library and then clicking to confirm at any position in the image, the user can use the component standards in the library to automatically frame on the image area to register the components, thus realizing the purpose of reusing the component definition data to simplify the programming process.

fixture.contextSentence: Before entering the new program mode, the user should place a qualified PCB for programming on the lower left corner of the workbench and fix the fixture on the workbench.

image section.contextSentence: For each item, color extraction determines whether the inspection frame can reach this color standard and thereby determines whether the inspection frame is qualified or NG by setting the thresholds of three channels, including hue, brightness and saturation, of pixels within the image section and setting.

special point images.contextSentence: CAD import registration: if the user has the coordinate position file (EXCEL or text format) of the component on the PCB, the coordinate file can be imported through the CAD import function provided by the system, and the system will automatically generate CAD virtual component points at the corresponding positions and display them in the image working area as special point images.

tested components.contextSentence: When the component inspection failure in a certain area exceeds a certain percentage,the inspection of this area will be skipped,which means that all components including the tested components in this area will not be deemed NG.
